dict.string: Grove needs access to your Desktop to load Git projects you have registered there.
Grove needs access to your Documents folder to load Git projects you have registered there.
Grove needs access to your Downloads folder to load Git projects you have registered there.
Grove needs access to removable volumes to load Git projects you have registered there.
Grove needs access to network volumes to load Git projects you have registered there.
Grove uses AppleEvents to launch terminals and editors for your tasks.
Grove needs microphone access to transcribe your voice into text for AI prompts.
Grove uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice into text.
